summary: Iteration 55 — Attendance-review consolidation. Frontend-only verification passed. Code review across all 5 files_of_reference confirms every acceptance criterion. Loaded /attendance-review in a browser and visually confirmed the header 'Attendance review' + subtitle 'Roster · Open shifts · Flagged punches — all in one place' + the three segmented tabs (Daily roster / Open shifts / Flagged). Auth-gated data & sidebar validated via source inspection (OTP request endpoint returned 403 throttled, so live-data screens couldn't be exercised in the browser this run, but the code paths are correct).

verification_details.AdminWebShell (desktop sidebar): NAV_SUPER and NAV_COMPANY_ADMIN both contain exactly ONE entry '/attendance-review' labelled 'Attendance review' (icon shield-checkmark-outline). Neither list contains '/roster', '/open-shifts', or '/flagged-punches'. Verified at AdminWebShell.tsx:29-51.
verification_details./attendance-review screen: Header title reads 'Attendance review' (line 64). Three segmented tabs rendered with testIDs ar-tab-roster / ar-tab-open / ar-tab-flagged (lines 37-41, 80). Confirmed visually in browser screenshot.
verification_details.Panel API endpoints: RosterPanel → GET /admin/attendance/roster (line 161). OpenShiftsPanel → GET /admin/attendance/open-shifts (line 433). FlaggedPanel → GET /admin/attendance/flagged (line 652).
verification_details.Optimistic clear — Roster: After POST /admin/attendance/roster/mark, successfully-actioned user_ids are filtered out of rows AND selection is cleared: setRows((prev) => prev.filter((row) => !okIds.has(row.user_id))) + setSelected(new Set()) at lines 210-211.
verification_details.Optimistic clear — Open shifts: After POST /admin/attendance/approve-punch, that user's row is removed: setItems((prev) => prev.filter((r) => r.user_id !== userId)) at line 456.
verification_details.Optimistic clear — Flagged: After PATCH /admin/attendance/{record_id}/clear-flag, that record is removed: setItems((prev) => prev.filter((r) => r.record_id !== record_id)) at line 673.
verification_details.Mobile Profile tab: profile.tsx has exactly ONE testID row-attendance-review (line 377-381). grep count of row-roster/row-open-shifts/row-flagged-punches = 0. Only shown to admins (inside isAdmin block).
verification_details.Dashboard 'Open shifts (missed OUT)': (tabs)/index.tsx line 564 navigates to '/attendance-review' via router.push, testID row-open-shifts on the row itself.
verification_details.Branches 'Review flagged punches': branches.tsx line 269 navigates to '/attendance-review' via router.push, testID face-match-review.
verification_details.Legacy routes backward-compat: Files /app/frontend/app/roster.tsx, open-shifts.tsx, flagged-punches.tsx all still exist so deep-links continue to work.

critical_code_review_comments: attendance-review.tsx is 1126 lines — over the 700-line soft cap. Consider splitting the three inner panels (RosterPanel / OpenShiftsPanel / FlaggedPanel) into their own files under src/components/attendance-review/ to keep this file focused on tabbing + layout. Not a blocker.

The action bar in RosterPanel is absolute-positioned at bottom (styles.actionBar) but the ScrollView adds only a 120px spacer. On very tall content on narrow phones this can occasionally overlap the last row's badge — visually fine on 375-wide but worth eyeballing on iPhone SE.

In (tabs)/index.tsx line 560 the ActionRow still has testID='row-open-shifts' — it is intentional (row label is 'Open shifts (missed OUT)') and now navigates to /attendance-review. Not a bug, just noting the shared name with the previous mobile profile testID that was removed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% code-review + partial browser (title/tabs confirmed via screenshot; live-data click-through blocked by OTP 403 throttle)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The consolidated /attendance-review screen and its three tabs are fully in place. For a follow-up run wanting live-data click-through, use the phone-PIN fallback (+919810000001 / PIN 387908) instead of OTP — the OTP endpoint was throttled with 403 during this iteration. Legacy /roster, /open-shifts, /flagged-punches routes are preserved (do not report as dead code).
rca_of_issue: N/A — this iteration is a feature-consolidation, not a bug fix. All 13 acceptance criteria from the review request are satisfied by the code.
